steps.t: Valuables once belonging to Thane Wulfrad, Béortnoth's father, might still remain in the ruins of the Mead Hall of Thornhope. Máthild asked you to fin…
Máthild is encamped outside the walls of Thornhope. You should bring the items you found to Máthild.
Thane Béortnoth is encamped outside the walls of Thornhope. Máthild asked you to bring the items you collected to Thane Béortnoth.
